---
title: "Neurocognitive functioning in comorbid insomnia and sleep apnea patients is better after positive airway pressure therapy, but worse after cognitive behavioral therapy for insomnia: Exploratory analysis of cognitive outcomes from the Multidisciplinary Approach to the Treatment of Insomnia and Comorbid Sleep Apnea study"
authors: "Turner, A. D., Ong, J. C., Jones, A. L., Tu, A., Salanitro, & Crawford, M. R."
year: 2023
date: 2023-01-01
pub-journal: "Sleep"
volume: "46"
pages: "1–12"
doi: "10.1093/sleep/zsad128"
pdf: "assets/papers/2023/turneretal2023.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
